rulings.Case Title: KENNETH GARRETT VS. GWENDOLYN MCCRAY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday September 11, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANT GWENDOLYN MCCRAY, DONALD GARRETT DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Abatement of this action is not proper under CCP 430.10(c) or under the doctrine of exclusive concurrent jurisdiction. (To the extent this motion is based on PC 854, abatement is also not proper as PC 854 governs abatement of probate petitions, not civil actions). The subject matter of this civil action is life estate allegedly created after the death of parties' mother. Moving party failed to provide any argument or authority suggesting that Probate Court has jurisdiction over this subject matter. Additionally, it appears to this Court, that the determination of the existence of a life estate is essential to any partition by sale as, at the very least, it will have a significant impact on the sale price of the property, if and when any Court determines that partition by sale is proper. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALICE GRIFFITH II LP VS. LAURA JONES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points & Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday September 11, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANT LAURA JONES MOTION / Notice Of Motion and Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment GRANTED, subject to (1) Defendant filing and presenting a courtesy copy of Proof of Service for this Motion no later than 9:00 a.m. on September 11, 2018; (2) opposition; (3) Defendant posting $3,002 with the Court no later than September 11, 2018 by 4:00 p.m.; and (4) Defendant thereafter filing an answer no later than September 11, 2018 by 4:00 p.m. = (501/REQ)
